title: Nerariyan CBI
subTitle: Years after a young woman, Mythili, is murdered in a supposedly haunted mansion, Sethurama Iyer, a CBI officer, decides to find the culprit and solve the mystery.

title: Female Unnikrishnan
subTitle: Unnikrishnan, a man with a feminine voice, gets made fun of among his neighbourhood. Things take an unusual turn when he marries a wealthy woman with speech impairment.

title: Thelivu
subTitle: Gauri accidentally kills a wealthy businessman to stop him from molesting a little girl. When his minions chase after her and her husband, they must hide until the proof to exonerate them is found.

title: Acha Dhin
subTitle: While looking to borrow money to meet his wife's medical expenses, Durgaprasad uncovers a deadly terrorist plot and must act to save the city from destruction.

title: Love 24x7
subTitle: Roopesh, a media executive, falls in love with Kabani, a trainee who works her way up to become a news presenter. A set of unforeseen events changes their personal and professional lives.

title: Pulimurugan
subTitle: A small village seeks help from a man with extraordinary force to protect them against man-eating tigers and the drug mafia.

title: Pullippulikalum Aattinkuttiyum
subTitle: Gopan, a tourist guide, issues a statement against his rival, Kuriyachan, regarding a human trafficking case. However, Kuriyachan seeks revenge against Gopan.

title: Varsham
subTitle: Venu, the owner of a small-scale finance firm, loses his son in an unfortunate incident. He gets involved in a lot of social work that soon leads him to become an obstacle in the way of his rivals.

title: Drishyam 2
subTitle: Georgekutty, a cinema hall owner, is a changed man who thrives in life. However, when his family become entangled in a criminal investigation, he must protect them from the legal institution.

title: Vishesham
subTitle: In the densely populated city of Cochin, a couple struggles through the process of finding the right fertility treatment for them.

title: Vishesham
subTitle: In the densely populated city of Cochin, a couple struggles through the process of finding the right fertility treatment for them.

title: Sufiyum Sujatayum
subTitle: Lovers Sufi and Sujata are forced to separate due to their religions. Years later, Sujata receives a phone call that intertwines their lives again.

title: Liger -- Saala Crossbreed
subTitle: A talented young MMA fighter trains hard to rise up the ranks. However, his goals are hindered when his lover is kidnapped.

title: Petromax
subTitle: Saravanan, an Indian living abroad, struggles to sell his ancestral home in India due to the supposed presence of ghosts in it. He devises a plan to prove that his house is not haunted.

title: Bhramaram
subTitle: Unni, a stockbroker, lives with his family happily, until he is greeted by a surprise visitor, who is his childhood friend. Soon, things take a turn as he discovers the true intentions of his old schoolmate, leading to chaos.

title: Bromance
subTitle: When Binto learns of his brother Shinto's disappearance, his search for Shinto leads him to collaborate with others, resulting in unforeseen turns, revelations, and memorable experiences.

title: Pushpa: The Rise - Part 1
subTitle: As Pushpa, a labourer, rises in the world of red sandalwood smuggling, he ends up making many enemies. However, violence ensues when the police try to topple his illegal business.

title: Minnal Murali
subTitle: Jaison, a young tailor, gains superpowers after being struck by lightning. However, he must thwart the evil intentions of an unexpected adversary to become the superhero that his rural village needs.

title: Hridayam
subTitle: Arun, a young man, enrols in an engineering college but falls prey to bad habits. As he grows up, he decides to turn over a new leaf and become a responsible adult.

title: Chunkzz
subTitle: The lives of four friends Romario, Riyas, Yoodas and Athmaram, take a dramatic turn when a girl joins their mechanical engineering class.

title: Chunkzz
subTitle: The lives of four friends Romario, Riyas, Yoodas and Athmaram, take a dramatic turn when a girl joins their mechanical engineering class.

title: Ishq
subTitle: Rahul and Priya meet on a flight to Hyderabad. However, when their flight is diverted to Goa, they spend a day together and eventually fall in love with each other.

title: Kaanekkaane
subTitle: Tehsildar Paul Mathai who visits his daughter's home for a short while decides to extend his stay after observing something is amiss.

title: Stand UP
subTitle: Keerthi, an aspiring stand-up comedian, is friends with Diya. Diya falls in love with Amal, Keerthi's brother, but their relationship quickly takes a dark turn due to a fight.

title: Movie
subTitle: Bringing the best in television.
